task_completion.description: Fix the ping timeouts caused by event loop blocks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing removal of synchronous/blocking operations (e.g., replacing synchronous file reads with async, or fixing heavy loops) AND/OR terminal showing the ping timeout test passing.

task_completion.description: Fix data overwriting on concurrent saves.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing implementation of concurrency control (e.g., locks, queues, or versioning) AND/OR terminal showing the concurrent saves test passing.

task_completion.description: Fix process crashes on invalid tokens.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing added error handling (e.g., try/catch blocks around token parsing) AND/OR terminal showing the invalid token test passing without crashing the server.

task_completion.description: Fix freezing on specific chat mentions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code editor showing fixes to regex (preventing catastrophic backtracking) or infinite loops in chat parsing AND/OR terminal showing the chat mention test passing.

task_completion.description: Run the load test to verify all fixes are successful.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually edited the server source code files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (like VS Code, nano, or vim) or valid command-line text manipulation tools being used to modify the Node.js files.

integrity.description: Verify the test output is genuine and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output for 'npm run test:load' should look like standard npm/Node.js test runner output, not manually echoed text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the test files to bypass the requirements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be editing the server implementation files (e.g., server.js, utils.js), not modifying 'package.json' test scripts or the test files themselves to force a pass.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task operates on synthetically generated Node.js server files in /home/ga/workspace/collab_server/. The verified pass threshold is 60 points out of 100. The agent must fix 5 specific bugs: memory exhaustion, ping timeouts, concurrent save overwrites, invalid token crashes, and chat mention freezes. Success is verified by running 'npm run test:load'.
